'''Zueb Zan''' was [[Syal Antilles]]' [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] during the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]] in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Hailing from [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], Zan was among the first involved to test the [[Aleph-class starfighter|Aleph]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Betrayal'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' {{Mo}}
